query:
INSERT INTO security_settings (setting_key, setting_value, description) VALUES
('failed_login_threshold', '5', 'Number of failed login attempts before auto-blocking IP'),
('failed_login_window_minutes', '15', 'Time window in minutes for counting failed login attempts'),
('rate_limit_threshold', '10', 'Number of rate limit hits before auto-blocking IP'),
('rate_limit_window_minutes', '10', 'Time window in minutes for counting rate limit hits'),
('suspicious_activity_threshold', '3', 'Number of suspicious activities before auto-blocking IP'),
('suspicious_activity_window_minutes', '30', 'Time window in minutes for counting suspicious activities'),
('auto_block_expiry_hours', '24', 'Default expiry time in hours for automatic IP blocks')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE setting_value=VALUES(setting_value)
